source: Ash feature request 2026-06-21 â€” validate findings across sources; return live news/web activity, not single-source snippets.
title: Research: deep_research tool â€” multi-source synthesis + cross-validation + citations
current_state: web_search returns raw single-pass results with no dedupe, no agreement/conflict signal, no credibility weighting, and no citations. Live news exists separately (awareness RSS). research_mode (3-agent) is command-only. Nothing combines + validates sources into one cited answer.
target_state: A deep_research(query) tool orchestrates the primitives into one validated, cited result: runs web_search + grounded_search (T-227) and, when the query is news/current-events, pulls live items from awareness (get_news/get_tech_updates). It dedupes across providers, flags where sources AGREE vs CONFLICT, attaches a freshness/recency note, and returns a structured payload {summary, key_points[], sources[{title,url}], agreement_notes, confidence}. Usable as a single tool by normie and root.
migration_plan: 1. New tools/tools_research.py: deep_research(query, recency_hint=None). Gather from web_search + grounded_search; if query looks like current-events/news, also pull AwarenessTools live items.

2. Cross-validation (lightweight, no ML): normalize URLs, dedupe by domain+title; group claims by source; mark a point 'corroborated' when >=2 independent domains agree, 'single-source' / 'conflicting' otherwise. Attach domain + recency as cheap credibility signals.

3. Synthesis: prefer a cheap/free tier (Groq) to compose the structured summary from gathered evidence â€” reuse research_mode's synthesis style; do NOT spin up the full 3-agent debate (keep latency/cost sane).
4. Return structured dict (summary, key_points, sources, agreement_notes, confidence). Add to normie allowlist; root has it via all-tools.

5. Tests: testing/test_deep_research.py (offline â€” stub web_search/grounded_search/awareness): corroborated point needs >=2 domains; conflicting sources surface in agreement_notes; news query pulls live items; sources are deduped; structured shape is stable.
risk_notes: Keep it cheap and synchronous-friendly: free tier for synthesis, the existing 1h web cache, and NO full 3-agent debate by default. Validation is heuristic (domain agreement + recency), not a truth oracle â€” name that honestly in the answer's confidence field so Pi never overclaims.
